error.capacity_details: waxay u baahan yihiin %d bits, awoodda ugu badan ee k=1 waa %d bits
error.empty_coefficients: Qaybta isku-dhafka ah ma madhnaan karto
error.empty_password: eraygaaga sirta ah ma madhnaan karo
error.header_embed_failed: Ku guuldareystay inuu geliyo cinwaanka fariinta: %v
error.insufficient_capacity: fariin aad u weyn oo aan loo isticmaali karin awoodda isku-xirnaanta la heli karo
error.insufficient_coefficients: isku-dheelitirnaan aan ku filnayn inta lagu jiro ku-darka: u baahan %d, helay %d
error.insufficient_header_coefficients: Isku-xidhka aan la isticmaali karin ee ku-xidhka cinwaanka: waxay u baahan yihiin 32 bits, waxaa la helay oo keliya isku-xidhka la isticmaali karo ee %d
error.invalid_coefficient_range: qiimaha isku-dhafka ah ee ka baxsan xadka ansax ah (-2048 ilaa 2047)
error.invalid_force_k: ForceK aan sax ahayn: waa inay noqotaa 0 (otomaatig ah) ama 1-8
error.invalid_k_parameter: Halbeegga k waa inuu ahaadaa inta u dhaxaysa 1 iyo 8
error.matrix_encode_failed: Habaynta matrix-ka ayaa ku guuldareysatay ereyga koodhka: %v
error.message_embed_failed: ku guuldareystay inuu soo geliyo fariin: %v
error.message_too_large: Cabbirka farriintu wuxuu dhaafayaa inta ugu badan ee la oggol yahay (8,388,607 bayt)
error.nil_random_source: Ilo aan kala sooc lahayn ma noqon karaan eber: isticmaal InitializePRNG(password) ama bixi RandomSource hore loo sii sameeyay
error.permutation_failed: ku guuldareystay inuu soo saaro isbeddelka isku-dhafka ah: %v

log.header_embedded: Cinwaanka farriinta ayaa ku dhex jira
log.k_selected: Halbeegga k ee ugu habboon ayaa la doortay
log.permutation_generated: Isbeddelka Coefficient-ka ee la soo saaray
log.shrinkage_detected: Yaraanshaha ayaa la ogaaday, qayb dib loo gelinayo
